specific_question: Between April 1 and September 30, 2025, how many total physical and digital assets did Elexion Automotive log into its lifecycle management platform?
answer: According to asset tracking summaries, 4,850 assets were logged into Elexion Automotive’s lifecycle system between Q2 and Q3, 2025.
dr_question: By Q2 2026, how can Elexion Automotive leverage the integration of digital engineering methodologies with digital twins to optimize EV battery performance and lifecycle management, while ensuring regulatory compliance across North American markets?
